sql_array: CREATE TABLE regression_data (id INT, independent_var FLOAT, dependent_var FLOAT);
INSERT INTO regression_data (id, independent_var, dependent_var) VALUES (1, 10.0, 20.0);
INSERT INTO regression_data (id, independent_var, dependent_var) VALUES (2, 15.0, 30.0);
UPDATE regression_data SET dependent_var = 25.0 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT REGR_AVGX(independent_var, dependent_var) FROM regression_data WHERE independent_var IS NOT NULL AND dependent_var IS NOT NULL;
